summary: Excellent audience recording of a mellow Southern night, highlighted by a soaring He's Gone and a monster Other One.
review: The three reviewers agree this December‑78 tape sounds very clear – some even call it the best Aud they’ve heard – and captures a relaxed Saturday crowd. Musically the show shines with a standout "He's Gone", an impressive 14‑minute "Other One" and several other memorable segues, making it a solid addition to any Deadhead collection.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are 4‑star, praising both the audio fidelity and the performance; standout songs are repeatedly highlighted while no negatives are noted.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as “pretty good” and “the best Aud you’ll find”; comparable to the well‑regarded Mississippi tape, clear and well‑balanced with no noted dropouts.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Mellow Saturday crowd on a Southern run; setlist mirrors the Mississippi show with relaxed pacing and several high‑energy jams.
